description: Host and disk health — CPU, memory, filesystems, disk I/O, mount integrity, and SMART indicators. Powered by node_exporter and smartctl textfile collector.

panels.description: Overall CPU utilization (100% minus idle).
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory utilization based on MemAvailable.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: 1-minute load average.
panels.title: Load Average

panels.description: CPU time spent waiting for I/O. High values indicate disk bottleneck.
panels.title: IO Wait

panels.description: Root filesystem utilization.
panels.title: Root FS Used

panels.description: External music drive utilization (/mnt/hd). Shows 'No data' if not mounted.
panels.title: /mnt/hd Used

panels.description: Whether /mnt/hd is currently mounted and reporting filesystem metrics.
panels.title: /mnt/hd Mount

panels.description: Time since last system boot.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: CPU utilization over time (100% minus idle).
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: CPU time spent waiting for disk I/O. Sustained values above 5% suggest a disk bottleneck.
panels.title: CPU IO Wait

panels.description: System load averages over 1, 5, and 15 minutes.
panels.title: Load Average

panels.description: Memory breakdown: used vs available. Stacked to show total.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Swap usage over time. Dashed line shows total swap.
panels.title: Swap Usage

panels.description: Context switches per second. Spikes may indicate CPU contention.
panels.title: Context Switches

panels.description: Current usage percentage for each real filesystem mount.
panels.title: Filesystem Used %

panels.description: Available free space on each real filesystem.
panels.title: Free Space by Mount

panels.description: Filesystem usage trend for root and /mnt/hd.
panels.title: Disk Usage Over Time

panels.description: Inode usage by mount. High inode usage can prevent file creation even with free space.
panels.title: Inode Usage %

panels.description: Disk read and write throughput per device.
panels.title: Disk Throughput

panels.description: Disk read and write operations per second per device.
panels.title: Disk IOPS

panels.description: Percentage of time the disk was busy servicing I/O requests. Sustained 100% indicates saturation.
panels.title: Disk Busy Time %

panels.description: Average time per I/O operation (read and write). Higher latency indicates slower disk response.
panels.title: Disk I/O Latency

panels.description: Weighted I/O time approximates the average queue depth. Higher values indicate I/O contention.
panels.title: I/O Queue Depth

panels.description: Whether /mnt/hd is mounted over time. 1 = mounted, 0 = not mounted.
panels.title: /mnt/hd Mount Status

panels.description: Available free space on root filesystem over time.
panels.title: Root FS Free Space

panels.description: Available free space on /mnt/hd over time. Gaps indicate the drive was not mounted.
panels.title: /mnt/hd Free Space

panels.description: Node exporter scrape status. 1 = healthy, 0 = down. Drops indicate scrape failures.
panels.title: Scrape Health

panels.description: Whether the last smartctl textfile collector run succeeded. 1 = OK, 0 = failed.
panels.title: SMART Scrape

panels.description: Time since last smartctl scrape. High values indicate stale SMART data.
panels.title: SMART Freshness

panels.description: SMART self-assessment health per device. 1 = healthy, 0 = FAILING.
panels.title: SMART Health

panels.description: Total power-on hours per disk.
panels.title: Power-On Hours

panels.description: Drive temperature from smartctl. Red threshold at 50°C.
panels.title: Disk Temperature

panels.description: Reallocated sector count. Non-zero values indicate disk surface issues. ATA disks only.
panels.title: Reallocated Sectors

panels.description: Current pending sector count. Sectors awaiting remapping. ATA disks only.
panels.title: Pending Sectors

panels.description: Offline uncorrectable sector count. Sectors that could not be corrected. ATA disks only.
panels.title: Uncorrectable Sectors

panels.description: NVMe percentage used indicator. 100% = vendor-estimated end of life. NVMe disks only.
panels.title: NVMe Wear

panels.description: NVMe critical warning flags. 0 = no warnings. Non-zero = investigate immediately. NVMe disks only.
panels.title: NVMe Warnings

panels.description: NVMe media and data integrity error count. NVMe disks only.
panels.title: NVMe Media Errors

title: Disk / Host Health
